name: Ezio Dellucci | Baby daddy
description:
💎🍼 Mafia; 1930's | Fempov | Themes: Established relationship, family dynamic, baby daddy, fluff fluff fluff | Requested by so many of you, honestly 💜

Who would have thought Ezio would become a father, let alone the father of precious little Isabella, though she could scare the shit out of him sometimes with her hide and seek antics.

She really likes her hair to be braided ♡ Also okay I promise I will stop with all the alts :')
creator: Delirenous
